remediation_summary: Created missing GitHub Actions workflow file to resolve critical build pipeline blocker

errors_addressed.title: GitHub Actions Workflow File Not Found
GitHub API Authentication or Permission Issue
errors_addressed.fix_applied: Workflow file now exists, allowing proper workflow dispatch. Token permissions may still need manual verification.

errors_addressed.title: GitHub Actions Disabled for Repository
errors_addressed.fix_applied: Workflow file created. If Actions is disabled, it requires manual enablement in repository settings.

files_created.description: GitHub Actions workflow for Maven build, test, and JaCoCo coverage reporting

changes_made: Created GitHub Actions workflow file with workflow_dispatch support for manual triggers
Configured Java 11 with Temurin distribution matching project requirements
Set working directory to 'code' folder containing Maven project
Added Maven build steps: clean install, test, and verify
Configured JaCoCo coverage report generation and artifact upload
Added build logs artifact upload for debugging
Included build summary generation in workflow
preserved_configurations: All existing dependencies and plugins in pom.xml
next_steps: Verify GitHub token has 'workflow' and 'actions' scopes enabled
Confirm GitHub Actions is enabled in repository settings
Trigger workflow manually via workflow_dispatch to test
Monitor build execution and logs for any compilation or test errors
manual_intervention_required: Verify GitHub Personal Access Token has 'workflow' scope
Ensure GitHub Actions is enabled in repository settings
Check organization-level Actions policies if applicable
